signals.headline: [Context] Will Dogecoin reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026?
signals.raw:
No definitive evidence confirms Dogecoin (DOGE) will reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026; current price hovers around **$0.09–$0.094**, with most analyst forecasts predicting a year-end range of **$0.105–$0.17**, making $0.16 plausible but uncertain amid bearish sentiment.[2][3][4]

### Current Status (as of April 10, 2026)
- **Price**: Trading at approximately **$0.0939–$0.094**, down from late 2025 levels near $0.12, reflecting a 67% yearly loss and extreme fear (Fear & Greed Index: 16).[1][2][3]
